title: How Do I List My Car on BuyAndScrap?
metaDescription: Wondering how to sell your car in the UK? Discover how do I list my car on BuyAndScrap with our simple, step-by-step guide. Quick, easy & free!
targetKeyword: how do i list my car on buyandscrap
content:
# How Do I List My Car on BuyAndScrap?

So, you've decided it's time for a change, and you're looking to sell your current set of wheels. Excellent choice coming to BuyAndScrap.com! We're here to make the process of selling your car as simple and stress-free as possible, connecting you with eager buyers across the UK.

But if you're wondering, "how do I list my car on BuyAndScrap?" – don't worry, you're in the right place. It's much easier than you might think.

## Getting Ready to Sell Your Car

Before you dive in, a little preparation goes a long way to make your listing shine and attract the right buyer.

### Gather Your Car's Details

Have your car's essential information ready. We're talking about things like the current mileage, service history, any recent work done, the condition (inside and out), and key features. The more detail you provide, the better buyers can understand what you're offering.

### Snap Some Great Photos

High-quality photos are crucial! Take clear, well-lit pictures from different angles – exterior, interior, dashboard, wheels, and any unique features. A clean car always looks better, so give it a quick wash beforehand!

## The Simple Steps to Listing Your Car

The good news is, learning how do I list my car on BuyAndScrap is super straightforward. We’ve designed our platform to be intuitive, ensuring you can get your car listed in no time.

### Step 1: Head to Our 'Sell Your Car' Page

Look for the prominent "Sell Your Car" button or link on our homepage. This is your gateway to creating a listing.

### Step 2: Enter Your Registration Number

To kick things off, simply enter your car's UK registration number. Our system will then automatically pull a lot of the basic information about your vehicle, making the rest of the process even quicker.

### Step 3: Tell Us More About Your Car

This is where you add all those juicy details you gathered earlier. Describe your car's condition accurately, highlight its best features, and be honest about any minor quirks. This transparency builds trust with potential buyers.

### Step 4: Add Your Photos

Upload those brilliant photos you took. You can usually add multiple images, so make sure to show off your car from every angle.

### Step 5: Set Your Price & Go Live!

Based on your research and our valuation tools, set a competitive price for your car. Once you're happy with everything, hit 'Go Live', and your car will be visible to thousands of potential buyers!

## What Happens Next?

Once your car is listed, interested buyers will be able to contact you directly through our secure messaging system. You can then arrange viewings and negotiate the sale safely and conveniently. It's really that simple to make listing your vehicle on BuyAndScrap a doddle. So, how do I list my car on BuyAndScrap effectively? By following these easy steps!

So, there you have it – a clear guide on how do I list my car on BuyAndScrap. We're here to help you get the best price for your car with minimum fuss.
